privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Kubernetes environment configured via setup_task.sh. The resources are deployed to the 'logistics' namespace. The target services ('order-api', 'tracking-svc', 'inventory-svc', 'notification-hub') and their corresponding deployments ('order-api-deploy', 'tracking-deploy', 'inventory-deploy', 'notification-deploy') explicitly match the metadata claims. The verifier uses a pass_threshold of 70, requiring the agent to successfully reconcile at least 3 out of 4 services.
